title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz to v0.18.2
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter) | `v0.18.1` → `v0.18.2` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainerd%2fstargz-snapshotter%2festargz/v0.18.2?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainerd%2fstargz-snapshotter%2festargz/v0.18.1/v0.18.2?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containerd/stargz-snapshotter (github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz)</summary>

### [`v0.18.2`](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/releases/tag/v0.18.2)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/compare/v0.18.1...v0.18.2)

#### Notable Changes

- Fixed restart failure when kubeconfig-based authentication is enabled ([#​2217](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2217))
- Fixed the filesystem to display ".." and "." entries in directories ([#​2188](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2188))
- Allowed asynchronous prefetch via configurable threshold ([#​2216](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2216)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)
- Allowed configuring the global request timeout duration ([#​2215](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2215)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)
- Allowed optionally adding log file access information on first access ([#​2205](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2205)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)
- Fixed ctr-remote's "-t" flag's not defined error when optimizing an image ([#​2186](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2186)), thanks to [@​bettermultiply](https://redirect.github.com/bettermultiply)
- Fixed ctr-remote's "--reuse" flag being ignored when "--no-optimize" is set ([#​2206](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2206)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)
- Fixed passthrough mode to ensure closing fds ([#​2226](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2226)), thanks to [@​luochenglcs](https://redirect.github.com/luochenglcs)
- Fixed incorrect variable assign in the estargz lib ([#​2222](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2222)), thanks to [@​bettermultiply](https://redirect.github.com/bettermultiply)
- Fixed errors in k3s CI ([#​2207](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2207)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)

</details>
